title: concatenate array and queue causes C++ compile error

features.name: queue_to_unpacked_array_concatenation
features.description: Code should include concatenation of a queue with an unpacked array where the result is assigned back to a queue
features.snippet: byte foo[$]; byte bar[2]; initial foo = {foo, bar};

features.name: queue_variable_in_concatenation
features.description: Code should include a queue variable used as the first operand in a concatenation expression

features.name: unpacked_array_in_queue_concatenation
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array used as second operand in concatenation with a queue
